title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.42.0 to 1.43.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.42.0 to 1.43.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.43.0

What's Changed

  • Bump to v1.42.0 by @​nalind in containers/storage#1297
  • fix return error in device mapper by @​alicefr in containers/storage#1298
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.3 to 0.9.4 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1299
  • Remove a couple of cases of possibly wrapping nil as errors by @​nalind in containers/storage#1300
  • fix typos and spelling by @​eriksjolund in containers/storage#1303
  • [CI:DOCS] Cirrus: Use the latest imgts container by @​cevich in containers/storage#1301
  • pkg/unshare: declare init() as static by @​gustavosbarreto in containers/storage#1305
  • overlay: do not clone source recursively by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1309
  • unshare: improve rootless detection by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1312
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.1.3 to 1.1.4 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1313
  • test: use T.TempDir to create temporary test directory by @​Juneezee in containers/storage#1315
  • overlay: use the right lowers for read-only mounts via subprocess by @​nalind in containers/storage#1314
  • Don't use subprocess output as a format specifier by @​nalind in containers/storage#1318
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/go-units from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1320
  • docs/containers-storage.conf.5.md: reformat by @​dilyanpalauzov in containers/storage#1319
  • Fix data race between ReloadIfChanged and read-only usage of layerStore by @​tyler92 in containers/storage#1322
  • Don't fail on walking os of EOPNOTSUPP for Llistxatt by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1323
  • overlay: change log message verbosity by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1329
  • chrootarchive: propagate env from parent by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1327
  • Update layerspathModified before reading the contents by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1331
  • Explain why a substring match is sufficient when reading uid_map by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1330
  • ReadMemInfo: Add missing import of errors by @​dfr in containers/storage#1334
  • Fix various warnings by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1333
  • pkg/lockfile: nits by @​kolyshkin in containers/storage#1336
  • Comment fixups by @​nalind in containers/storage#1338
  • Tweak a couple of error messages by @​nalind in containers/storage#1341
  • Remove an undocumented assumption that O_RDONLY == 0 by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1343
  • overlay: when we warn about the kernel, mention the version by @​nalind in containers/storage#1340
  • Use defined constants for flag names by @​nalind in containers/storage#1339
  • layers.Wipe(): try to remove layers before their parents by @​nalind in containers/storage#1342
  • tests/tools/Makefile: we don't use ffjson any more by @​nalind in containers/storage#1347
  • tests/idmaps.bats: only test .imagestore on overlay and vfs by @​nalind in containers/storage#1348
  • Update to go-zfs v3.0.0 by @​nalind in containers/storage#1349
  • Revert incorrect "heeded" -> "needed" typo fix by @​nalind in containers/storage#1350
  • Fix LUtimesNano on FreeBSD by @​dfr in containers/storage#1353
  • pkg/system: Allow EnsureRemoveAll to delete trees with immutable files by @​dfr in containers/storage#1355
  • tests/idmaps.bats: only run idmaps tests on Linux by @​dfr in containers/storage#1358
  • If XDG_CONFIG_HOME env is set we should use it and ignore defaults by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1357
  • tests/helpers.bash: Fix setting the mtime to epoch in createrandom by @​dfr in containers/storage#1366
  • Eval symlinks on XDG_RUNTIME_DIR by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1359
  • Use system defaults if storage.conf does not exist in XDG_CONFIG_HOME by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1363
  • Fix accessing to layer without lock by @​tyler92 in containers/storage#1351
  • Make the unit tests work for FreeBSD by @​dfr in containers/storage#1360
  • drivers/driver_linux: Show fstype in GetFSMagic() if debug logging is enabled by @​aarontomlin in containers/storage#1367

New Contributors

  • @​alicefr made their first contribution in containers/storage#1298
  • @​eriksjolund made their first contribution in containers/storage#1303

... (truncated)

Commits
  • 04d8b90 Bump to v1.43.0
  • dcb8b68 Merge pull request #1367 from aarontomlin/atomlin-add-debug-data-to-getfsmagic
  • 42f81a2 Merge pull request #1360 from dfr/freebsd-tests
  • 04eb963 drivers/driver_linux: Show fstype in GetFSMagic() if debug logging is enabled
  • d9e14ec Merge pull request #1351 from tyler92/fix-panic-in-layers
  • 6fe129c Merge pull request #1363 from rhatdan/config
  • 06fae83 Merge pull request #1359 from rhatdan/XDG_RUNTIME_DIR
  • dfe3e77 Merge branch 'main' into XDG_RUNTIME_DIR
  • f75d738 Use system defaults if storage.conf does not exist in XDG_CONFIG_HOME
  • acd039f pkg/parsers/operatingsystem: Disable tests on FreeBSD
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
